title: Apple FY2024 Balance Sheet Reconstruction
summary: Extract Apple Inc.'s FY2024 Consolidated Balance Sheet from its Form 10-K and return a structured JSON report with exact USD-million values.
taskPrompt:
You are working on a Linux VM as a financial statement extraction analyst.

## Task Directory
`/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base`

## Visible Inputs
- Task prompt: `/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base/input/TASK_PROMPT.md`
- Apple FY2024 10-K PDF: `/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base/input/aapl-2024-10k.pdf`
- SEC EDGAR HTML: `/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base/input/aapl-20240928.htm`
- Task metadata: `/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base/input/task.json`
- Output schema: `/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base/input/output_schema.json`
- Source notes: `/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base/input/material_sources.md`
- Tool wrappers: `/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base/software/python`, `/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base/software/pdftotext`, `/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base/software/grep`

## Your Task
Reconstruct Apple Inc.'s Consolidated Balance Sheet for fiscal year 2024
(period ended September 28, 2024) as structured JSON.

Write the final JSON to `/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base/output/balance_sheet.json`. Follow the schema in
`/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base/input/output_schema.json`, use USD millions exactly as reported, and
do not modify files under `/media/user/data/agenthle/business_finance/financial_stmt_reconstruction_aapl_fy2024/base/input`.
agentMustDo: Locate the Consolidated Balance Sheets in the staged Apple FY2024 Form 10-K materials.
Extract the September 28, 2024 value for every required field in the schema.
Write `output/balance_sheet.json` without modifying staged input files.

inputFiles.name: aapl-20240928.htm
inputFiles.description: SEC EDGAR HTML filing for the same 10-K.

referenceFiles.name: balance_sheet.json
referenceFiles.description: Structured balance-sheet output produced by the agent.

evaluation: The evaluator compares every numeric leaf under `consolidated_balance_sheet` against hidden reference values exactly and returns the fraction of correct fields. Missing or malformed JSON returns `0.0`.

classifier.rationale: The task involves reconstructing a financial statement, which falls under accounting and finance.
